title: AI Medical Diagnostic Assistant
shortDesc: Predicts early-stage diseases from X-Ray images using CNNs.
longDesc: A comprehensive backend solution integrating Convolutional Neural Networks trained on thousands of medical images to assist radiologists in early detection. Features include a React dashboard for doctors, secure patient data handling via Django, and automated PDF reporting formatted to university standards.

title: Smart Crop Monitoring IoT
shortDesc: Hardware integration for live soil moisture tracking.
longDesc: An end-to-end IoT system designed for modern agriculture. This project uses Arduino microcontrollers and NodeMCU to collect real-time data on soil moisture, temperature, and humidity. The data is streamed via WebSockets to a React dashboard where users can visualize trends and receive automated irrigation alerts.

title: Decentralized Voting System
shortDesc: A tamper-proof electoral system using Ethereum smart contracts.
longDesc: A highly secure voting mechanism built entirely on the Ethereum blockchain. It eliminates the possibility of voter fraud through decentralized ledger verification. Includes an admin panel to register candidates and a voter portal where identities are verified cryptographically before casting a ballot.

title: Microservices Retail Platform
shortDesc: A scalable online shopping backend built with a microservices architecture.
longDesc: Designed to mimic enterprise-level cloud platforms. This e-commerce application separates user authentication, product catalog management, and order processing into distinct microservices. Everything is containerized using Docker and orchestrated to handle high concurrency smoothly.

title: Fake News Detection Engine
shortDesc: A text-classification engine that evaluates factual validity.
longDesc: A Natural Language Processing tool that scrapes news articles and utilizes TF-IDF vectors alongside Logistic Regression to detect potential misinformation. It comes with a browser extension mock-up and a Django backend that calculates a 'truth probability score' for any submitted text.

title: Intrusion Detection System
shortDesc: A network monitoring tool that visualizes malicious payloads.
longDesc: An advanced security project that acts as a honeypot and network sniffer. It intercepts network traffic in real-time, logs suspicious packet payloads using Snort signatures, and visualizes attack vectors on a React dashboard mapping the geolocation of potential threats.
